title: A quick heads up on Magic Monday

comments.content: I'm in New York City right now, having attended a conference on occultism and the humanities, and will be going to the afterparty shortly. It's by no means certain I'll be back before midnight and by no means impossible that I'll be too tired (and possibly too inebriated as well) to post Magic Monday as soon as I get back. Have no fear, it'll go up as soon as I can manage it.

metadata.music: Spider Rich and Boots Randolph, "Yakety Sax"

comments.title: (no subject)
comments.content: We can wait! Enjoy the party!

replies.title: (no subject)
replies.content: Thank you! I had a grand time. Generally speaking, it's been a great weekend.

comments.title: (no subject)
comments.content:
Very cool! I am happy you got to go... I interviewed Pam Grossman many years ago, around 2012 or 2013, when I had my own radio show. Did you catch Hex Breaker Quintet? How were the talks? Anything stand out?

Justin Patrick Moore

comments.title: Enjoy!
comments.content:
Hope you have a marvelous time in NYC! I’m not there right now but it is my home base and it would have been nice to meet for a drink… next time?!
Jill C Yogaandthetarot

replies.title: Re: Enjoy!
replies.content: JMG, we should do a New York meetup.

replies.title: Re: Enjoy!
replies.content: I'm certainly up for that. NYC is an easy three hour train ride from Providence and I can head that way pretty much any time I have a free weekend. If someone in NYC wants to take charge of making the arrangements, we can start comparing schedules.

replies.title: Re: Enjoy!
replies.content:
Hello There! I would be a happy attendee to an nyc meetup if I’m in town!
Right now too much on my plate to organize anything properly and fully but might be of help along the way?
I will check back on this thread for thoughts and info exchange if necessary🤩
Jill C Yogaandthetarot
